style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid prophetic clock with golden hands crimson biblical verse hour markings and golden circuit fractal clock face with hands pointing to critical moment in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the golden hands pointing to the critical moment on the circuit-fractal clock face
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated computer room with grey code screens in background

symbolism.primary: the clock counting to the moment when the image surpasses its maker
symbolism.secondary: circuit fractal clock face as prophecy written in the language of technology

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
